title: Aggaba
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Aggaba |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Offworld Mining Corporation]] *[[Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Aggaba, I want to hire you and your people.''"
"''Which ones?''"
"''All of you. You're temporarily the head of these men, until you reach Bandomeer. I'll buy out your contracts.|Clat'Ha to Aggaba before reaching Bandomeer|}} '''Aggaba''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] assistant who worked for [[Jemba]] of the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]]. During a flight to [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] on the [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] shot down the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and left Aggaba and the ship's other occupants temporarily stranded on an unknown [[Planet/Legends|world]]. After Jemba was accidentally shot and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Hutt [[Grelb]] during a battle against [[draigon]]s, [[Clat'Ha]] offered Aggaba twenty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for every miner's contract, as well as an additional twenty thousand credits as a signing bonus for joining Clat'Ha and the [[Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation]]. Aggaba accepted the deal, and several other Offworld miners left the mining corporation as well. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Aggaba |pl=Aggaba }} [[Category:Businesspeople]] [[Category:Clerical workers and assistants]] [[Category:Hutts]] [[Category:Males]]
